text.title: Three-Tier Pyramid Is Mandatory
text.summary: Every directory with agent-relevant logic carries CLAUDE.md (hook), AGENTS.md (brief), and optional .agents/INDEX.md (catalogue) in that order of load cost.

section.title: The hook + brief + catalogue contract
section.p: The pyramid separates auto-load (cheap, always paid) from on-demand (expensive, paid only when needed). CLAUDE.md is a one-line hook. AGENTS.md is the brief. .agents/INDEX.md is the catalogue of deep docs an agent loads only after deciding the dir is relevant.

rule.statement: For every directory containing source code or agent-relevant configuration, the repo MUST contain `CLAUDE.md` whose entire body is `@AGENTS.md` (one line, no other text), `AGENTS.md` between 20 and 80 lines (hard cap 120) covering what-this-dir-IS plus build/test/deploy commands plus active gotchas, and — when reference depth warrants — `.agents/INDEX.md` listing every deep-reference doc as a single Markdown table. CI MUST fail when any source directory is missing the `CLAUDE.md` + `AGENTS.md` pair or when `AGENTS.md` exceeds 120 lines.
rule.rationale: Claude Code reads only `CLAUDE.md`; non-Claude-Code agents read only `AGENTS.md`. The `@AGENTS.md` hook routes one to the other so a single brief serves both. The 80-line target keeps auto-load context under ~5k tokens, the empirical break-even where the routing brief stops helping and starts crowding the working set.

example.code:
# CLAUDE.md (1 line) @AGENTS.md
# AGENTS.md (40 lines) # auth/
OAuth2 authorization-code flow with PKCE. Runtime: Django 5, port 8000 (api), 8001 (api-dev).
## Commands - Test: `uv run pytest auth/` - Lint: `ruff check auth/`
## Gotchas - `state` cookie is HttpOnly+SameSite=Lax; do NOT change. - See `.agents/INDEX.md` for token-rotation deep dive.
example.note: Brief routes both Claude Code (via hook) and standalone agents (direct read) to the same authoritative context.

example.code: # CLAUDE.md (200 lines) # Auth module — full architecture ... (architecture diagram) ... (token rotation logic) ... (every gotcha ever)
example.note: Standalone agents never read this file. The auto-loaded context is now 200 lines of mostly-irrelevant material.

antipattern.description: Adding extra prose, links, or directives to `CLAUDE.md` beyond the single `@AGENTS.md` line.
antipattern.reason: Drift between `CLAUDE.md` and `AGENTS.md` immediately desyncs Claude Code from every other agent; the hook stops being a hook and becomes a second source of truth that nobody updates.

section.reference: Skeleton brief with the six required sections.
agents.md — the cross-vendor AGENTS.md spec adopted by OpenAI Codex, Cursor, aider.
Claude Code memory docs — `CLAUDE.md` auto-load behaviour and `@`-import semantics.
